subject: And you are ...?
body:
HI JEE        ~~~            where    r u   (still in  Israel?)     Still my 
friend ?  
I am getting to the probable expected stage of feeling frustration,pain ,  
and anticipating a diffficult transport home  . I have my massage therapist  
with me  (adorable, sweet and loving ~  from Colombia, S.A  ) now  since bruce 
went to the NY meeting and I must have her near me at all  times  so will  have 
to upgrade her to 1st class  on  American  anyway    . 3 hours assuming no set 
backs
Drs. orders ~  I Must be UP  every 20 minutes from a SIT  position anywhere 
so that can't be anticipated.
Wish I could just lie down and nap for the 3 hours!  Any chance St  Louis on 
your way back  from Israel or on a     similar  flight  pattern  ??  How 
amazing would that be for us soulmates  ????!!!!!
Dreaming (must be the meds so forgive  me)           
Hugs, Marsh
 
P>S>    primarily getting better , just tying not to  screw it up needlesly.  
Hi to Sarah & anyone u care  about



**************Wondering what's for Dinner Tonight? Get new twists on family 
favorites at AOL Food.      
(http://food.aol.com/dinner-tonight?NCID=aolfod00030000000001)
body_html:
HI JEE       ~~~           where    r u   (still in Israel?)     Still my friend ? 
I am getting to the probable expected stage of feeling frustration,pain , and anticipating a diffficult transport home  . I have my massage therapist with me  (adorable, sweet and loving ~  from Colombia, S.A  ) now since bruce went to the NY meeting and I must have her near me at all times  so will  have to upgrade her to 1st class  on American  anyway    . 3 hours assuming no set backs
Drs. orders ~  I Must be UP  every 20 minutes from a SIT position anywhere so that can't be anticipated.
Wish I could just lie down and nap for the 3 hours!  Any chance St Louis on your way back  from Israel or on a     similar flight  pattern  ??  How amazing would that be for us soulmates ????!!!!!
Dreaming (must be the meds so forgive me)           
Hugs, Marsh
 
P>S>    primarily getting better , just tying not to screw it up needlesly.  Hi to Sarah & anyone u care about
